posts.text: Western Gold (reserves) leaving NY & London ‘The share of central bank reserve gold stored in London has fallen from 64% to 57%. The New York Fed's share has dropped from 17% to 14%’
posts.author: wmiddelkoop

posts.text: I think it’s likely coming sooner rather than later… consider that smile every time Kjirstin is asked about the progress on USA gov deals, contracts, grants, and the USA GEIC. Seems the admin could use some positive announcements leading into the midterms. What better than a major initiative to make the USA the world leaders in Nano tech, nano materials and nano engineering. Turbostratic Fractal graphene is at that epic center.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
